creator: willtisdale@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

Unfortunately I will need to drop maintainership for this port as I am no longer using Eternalterminal on FreeBSD and more importantly no longer have a FreeBSD system to test on.

This is due to being forced back to linux due to Plex dropping support for Intel GPU accelerated transcoding on FreeBSD, which is extremely unfortunate.

Regards,

-Will
